about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our Story, Our Mission
about.storyTitle: The Story of Sewarth Path Sansthanam
about.story: Founded by Shri Mahesh Kumar Pandey, Sewarth Path Sansthanam is a registered public charitable trust under the Indian Trusts Act 1882, based in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh. Born from the eternal philosophy of 'सेवा परमो धर्म' — Service is the Highest Dharma — the organization works tirelessly for the welfare of all communities across India.
about.mission: To create a just, educated, healthy, and spiritually aware society through grassroots action in education, healthcare, cultural preservation, women empowerment, and environmental conservation.
